---
title: "Polypharmacy by Prescription Insurance Group"
author: "Nemo Zhou"
date: "2026-07-15"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 3
    number_sections: true
params:
  analysis_year: 2022
  polypharmacy_output_dir: null
---

<!--
Project: Frailty_Komoto annual polypharmacy insurance-group visualization
Author: Nemo Zhou
Date started: 2026-07-10
Date last updated: 2026-07-16

Purpose:
This R Markdown report visualizes aggregate annual polypharmacy outputs created
by Code/2_EDA/5.10_prepare_polypharmacy_insurance_subgroup_inputs.R and
Code/2_EDA/5.8_describe_annual_polypharmacy_atc3_prevalence.R. It does not connect to
Redshift. It reads aggregate CSV files from the project-root Outputs folder and
renders polypharmacy prevalence bars by age group, sex, and race/ethnicity
within each prescription insurance comparison group. It also renders top 10 ATC3
class prevalence across four prescription insurance comparison groups:
Commercial, Medicaid, Medicare Advantage, and Medicare FFS.
-->

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  fig.width = 11,
  fig.height = 6
)

library(ggplot2)
```

```{r helpers}
selected_analysis_year <- as.integer(params$analysis_year)
if (
  length(selected_analysis_year) != 1L ||
    is.na(selected_analysis_year) ||
    selected_analysis_year < 2016L ||
    selected_analysis_year > 2025L
) {
  stop("Set params$analysis_year to one integer year from 2016 through 2025.")
}

if (!is.null(params$polypharmacy_output_dir) && nzchar(params$polypharmacy_output_dir)) {
  output_dir <- params$polypharmacy_output_dir
} else {
  year_output_subdir <- paste0("5.x_annual_polypharmacy_", selected_analysis_year)
  output_dir_candidates <- c(
    file.path("Outputs", year_output_subdir),
    file.path("../Outputs", year_output_subdir),
    file.path("../../Outputs", year_output_subdir),
    "Outputs",
    "../Outputs",
    "../../Outputs"
  )
  output_dir <- output_dir_candidates[dir.exists(output_dir_candidates)][1]
}

if (is.null(output_dir) || is.na(output_dir) || !dir.exists(output_dir)) {
  stop(
    "Could not find the polypharmacy output directory. Run Code/2_EDA/5.10_prepare ",
    "and Code/2_EDA/5.8 first."
  )
}

read_required_csv <- function(file_name) {
  path <- file.path(output_dir, file_name)
  if (!file.exists(path)) {
    stop(
      "Missing required file: ",
      path,
      ". Run Code/2_EDA/5.10_prepare_polypharmacy_insurance_subgroup_inputs.R ",
      "and Code/2_EDA/5.8 first."
    )
  }

  utils::read.csv(path, stringsAsFactors = FALSE, check.names = FALSE)
}

filter_to_analysis_year <- function(data, data_name) {
  if (!"analysis_year" %in% names(data)) {
    stop(data_name, " must contain an analysis_year column.")
  }

  data$analysis_year <- as.integer(data$analysis_year)
  filtered <- data[data$analysis_year == selected_analysis_year, , drop = FALSE]

  if (nrow(filtered) == 0L) {
    available_years <- sort(unique(data$analysis_year[!is.na(data$analysis_year)]))
    stop(
      data_name,
      " does not contain analysis_year = ",
      selected_analysis_year,
      ". Available years: ",
      paste(available_years, collapse = ", "),
      ". Run Code/2_EDA/5.10_prepare_polypharmacy_insurance_subgroup_inputs.R ",
      "and Code/2_EDA/5.8_describe_annual_polypharmacy_atc3_prevalence.R for the selected year first."
    )
  }

  filtered
}

comma_label <- function(x) {
  format(round(as.numeric(x)), big.mark = ",", scientific = FALSE, trim = TRUE)
}

percent_axis_label <- function(x) {
  paste0(sprintf("%.0f", 100 * as.numeric(x)), "%")
}

percent_label_from_pct <- function(x) {
  paste0(sprintf("%.1f", as.numeric(x)), "%")
}

wrap_label <- function(x, width = 18) {
  vapply(
    as.character(x),
    function(value) paste(strwrap(value, width = width), collapse = "\n"),
    character(1)
  )
}

insurance_order <- c(
  "Commercial",
  "Medicaid",
  "Medicare Advantage",
  "Medicare FFS"
)

insurance_palette <- c(
  "Commercial" = "#2E86AB",
  "Medicaid" = "#7D5BA6",
  "Medicare Advantage" = "#3F7C85",
  "Medicare FFS" = "#A44A3F"
)

subgroup_labels <- c(
  age_group = "Age group",
  sex = "Sex",
  race_ethnicity = "Race/ethnicity"
)

subgroup_order <- c("age_group", "sex", "race_ethnicity")

map_rx_insurance_group <- function(group, segment) {
  group_clean <- toupper(trimws(as.character(group)))
  segment_clean <- toupper(trimws(as.character(segment)))

  mapped <- rep(NA_character_, length(group_clean))
  mapped[group_clean == "COMMERCIAL"] <- "Commercial"
  mapped[group_clean == "MEDICAID"] <- "Medicaid"
  mapped[
    group_clean == "MEDICARE" &
      (
        grepl("ADVANTAGE|\\bADV\\b", segment_clean) |
          segment_clean %in% c("MA", "MAPD")
      )
  ] <- "Medicare Advantage"
  mapped[
    group_clean == "MEDICARE" &
      (
        grepl("FFS|FEE|TRADITIONAL", segment_clean) |
          segment_clean %in% c("PDP")
      )
  ] <- "Medicare FFS"

  mapped
}

aggregate_sum <- function(data, key_columns, value_column, output_column) {
  aggregate(
    data[[value_column]],
    data[key_columns],
    sum,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ) |>
    setNames(c(key_columns, output_column))
}

order_stratum_values <- function(values) {
  values <- unique(as.character(values))
  age_order <- c("40-49", "50-64", "65-74", "75-84", "85+", "Unknown")
  sex_order <- c("F", "M", "Unknown")
  if (all(values %in% age_order)) {
    return(age_order[age_order %in% values])
  }
  if (all(values %in% sex_order)) {
    return(sex_order[sex_order %in% values])
  }
  sort(values)
}

prepare_polypharmacy_subgroup_levels <- function(data) {
  numeric_columns <- c(
    "analysis_year",
    "subgroup_denominator",
    "n_patients",
    "percent_within_subgroup"
  )
  data[numeric_columns] <- lapply(data[numeric_columns], as.numeric)
  data$rx_insurance_comparison_group <- factor(
    data$rx_insurance_comparison_group,
    levels = insurance_order
  )
  data <- data[
    !is.na(data$rx_insurance_comparison_group) &
      !is.na(data$percent_within_subgroup),
    ,
    drop = FALSE
  ]

  data
}

prepare_top_atc3_by_insurance <- function(data, top_n = 10L) {
  numeric_columns <- c(
    "analysis_year",
    "n_patient_years_with_atc3",
    "n_eligible_patient_years"
  )
  data[numeric_columns] <- lapply(data[numeric_columns], as.numeric)
  data$insurance_group <- map_rx_insurance_group(
    data$rx_insurance_group,
    data$rx_insurance_segment
  )
  data <- data[
    !is.na(data$insurance_group) &
      !is.na(data$n_patient_years_with_atc3) &
      !is.na(data$n_eligible_patient_years),
    ,
    drop = FALSE
  ]

  key_columns <- c("analysis_year", "insurance_group", "atc3", "atc3_label")
  numerators <- aggregate_sum(
    data,
    key_columns,
    "n_patient_years_with_atc3",
    "n_patient_years_with_atc3"
  )
  denominators <- aggregate_sum(
    data,
    key_columns,
    "n_eligible_patient_years",
    "n_eligible_patient_years"
  )
  aggregated <- merge(
    numerators,
    denominators,
    by = key_columns,
    all = TRUE
  )
  aggregated$prevalence_pct <- ifelse(
    aggregated$n_eligible_patient_years > 0,
    100 * aggregated$n_patient_years_with_atc3 / aggregated$n_eligible_patient_years,
    NA_real_
  )

  top_rows <- aggregate(
    aggregated$n_patient_years_with_atc3,
    aggregated[c("analysis_year", "atc3", "atc3_label")],
    sum,
    na.rm = TRUE
  )
  names(top_rows)[names(top_rows) == "x"] <- "overall_n_patient_years_with_atc3"
  top_rows <- top_rows[order(
    top_rows$analysis_year,
    -top_rows$overall_n_patient_years_with_atc3,
    top_rows$atc3
  ), , drop = FALSE]

  selected_rows <- list()
  for (analysis_year in unique(top_rows$analysis_year)) {
    year_rows <- top_rows[top_rows$analysis_year == analysis_year, , drop = FALSE]
    selected_rows[[as.character(analysis_year)]] <- utils::head(year_rows, top_n)
  }
  selected_top <- do.call(rbind, selected_rows)

  plot_data <- merge(
    aggregated,
    selected_top[c("analysis_year", "atc3")],
    by = c("analysis_year", "atc3"),
    all = FALSE
  )
  plot_data$insurance_group <- factor(
    plot_data$insurance_group,
    levels = insurance_order
  )
  plot_data$atc3_plot_label <- paste0(plot_data$atc3, " - ", plot_data$atc3_label)
  label_order <- selected_top$atc3[order(
    selected_top$analysis_year,
    selected_top$overall_n_patient_years_with_atc3
  )]
  label_order <- unique(label_order)
  atc3_label_lookup <- unique(plot_data[, c("atc3", "atc3_plot_label"), drop = FALSE])
  plot_data$atc3_plot_label <- factor(
    plot_data$atc3_plot_label,
    levels = atc3_label_lookup$atc3_plot_label[
      match(label_order, atc3_label_lookup$atc3)
    ]
  )

  plot_data
}

plot_polypharmacy_subgroup_levels <- function(data, subgroup) {
  plot_data <- data[
    data$stratification == subgroup &
      data$polypharmacy_group == "With polypharmacy" &
      !is.na(data$subgroup_denominator) &
      data$subgroup_denominator >= 11,
    ,
    drop = FALSE
  ]
  if (nrow(plot_data) == 0L) {
    return(NULL)
  }
  plot_data$stratum_value <- factor(
    plot_data$stratum_value,
    levels = order_stratum_values(plot_data$stratum_value)
  )
  plot_data$plot_label <- sprintf(
    "%.1f%%",
    100 * plot_data$percent_within_subgroup
  )

  ggplot(
    plot_data,
    aes(
      x = stratum_value,
      y = percent_within_subgroup,
      fill = rx_insurance_comparison_group
    )
  ) +
    geom_col(width = 0.65, color = "white", linewidth = 0.2) +
    geom_text(
      aes(label = plot_label),
      vjust = -0.25,
      color = "#1f2933",
      size = 2.8
    ) +
    facet_wrap(~ rx_insurance_comparison_group, nrow = 1) +
    scale_y_continuous(
      labels = percent_axis_label,
      expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.14))
    ) +
    scale_x_discrete(labels = function(x) wrap_label(x, width = 14)) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = insurance_palette, drop = FALSE) +
    labs(
      title = paste("Polypharmacy prevalence by", subgroup_labels[[subgroup]]),
      x = NULL,
      y = "Polypharmacy prevalence",
      fill = NULL
    ) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
    theme(
      axis.text.x = element_text(size = 9, angle = 45, hjust = 1),
      panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
      legend.position = "none"
    )
}

print_polypharmacy_subgroup_plots <- function(data) {
  for (subgroup in subgroup_order) {
    cat("\n\n## ", subgroup_labels[[subgroup]], "\n\n", sep = "")
    plot <- plot_polypharmacy_subgroup_levels(data, subgroup)
    if (is.null(plot)) {
      cat("No unsuppressed aggregate rows are available for this subgroup.\n\n")
    } else {
      print(plot)
    }
  }
}

plot_top_atc3_prevalence <- function(data) {
  data <- data[!is.na(data$prevalence_pct), , drop = FALSE]

  ggplot(
    data,
    aes(
      x = atc3_plot_label,
      y = prevalence_pct,
      fill = insurance_group
    )
  ) +
    geom_col(width = 0.65) +
    coord_flip() +
    facet_grid(analysis_year ~ insurance_group) +
    scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(x, "%")) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = insurance_palette, drop = FALSE) +
    labs(
      title = "Top 10 ATC3 class prevalence by prescription insurance group",
      x = NULL,
      y = "Prevalence",
      fill = NULL
    ) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 10) +
    theme(
      legend.position = "none",
      panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
      strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
    )
}
```

```{r read-data}
polypharmacy_by_rx_insurance_subgroup <- read_required_csv(
  "5.6_polypharmacy_level_by_rx_insurance_subgroup.csv"
)
atc3_by_rx_insurance <- read_required_csv(
  "5.8_annual_polypharmacy_atc3_prevalence_by_rx_insurance.csv"
)

polypharmacy_by_rx_insurance_subgroup <- filter_to_analysis_year(
  polypharmacy_by_rx_insurance_subgroup,
  "5.6_polypharmacy_level_by_rx_insurance_subgroup.csv"
)
atc3_by_rx_insurance <- filter_to_analysis_year(
  atc3_by_rx_insurance,
  "5.8_annual_polypharmacy_atc3_prevalence_by_rx_insurance.csv"
)

polypharmacy_subgroup_levels <- prepare_polypharmacy_subgroup_levels(
  polypharmacy_by_rx_insurance_subgroup
)
top_atc3_by_insurance <- prepare_top_atc3_by_insurance(atc3_by_rx_insurance)
```

# Polypharmacy Prevalence

```{r polypharmacy-prevalence-bars, results='asis', fig.show='asis', fig.width=13, fig.height=5.2}
print_polypharmacy_subgroup_plots(polypharmacy_subgroup_levels)
```

# Top 10 ATC3 Class Prevalence

```{r top-atc3-by-insurance, fig.width=14, fig.height=7}
plot_top_atc3_prevalence(top_atc3_by_insurance)
```
